email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Digital Experience Manager bij Timefold. Uw focus op het eigenaarschap van de website, sociale media en conversieoptimalisatie sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, contentbeheer en WordPress-ontwikkeling voor klantwebsites. Ik heb ervaring met het optimaliseren van conversiepaden en het analyseren van prestaties met tools zoals Google Analytics, Search Console en SEMrush. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren.

Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig te werken, prioriteiten te stellen en samen te werken met ontwikkelaars en designers. Mijn technische achtergrond in front-end development helpt mij om snel problemen op te sporen en op te lossen.

Ik spreek Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Gent, en ben klaar om mijn digitale marketingvaardigheden in te zetten voor Timefold.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Digital Experience Manager position at Timefold. Your focus on owning the website, social media, and conversion optimization aligns perfectly with my experience.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO, content management, and WordPress development for client websites. I have experience optimizing conversion paths and analyzing performance with tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines.

I am used to working independently, prioritizing tasks, and collaborating with developers and designers. My technical background in front-end development helps me quickly identify and resolve issues.

I speak English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Ghent, and am ready to bring my digital marketing skills to Timefold.

I hope to discuss my motivation and experience in an interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Digital Experience Manager bij Timefold. Uw oproep voor een hands-on digital marketeer die eigenaarschap neemt over website, sociale media en conversieoptimalisatie spreekt mij enorm aan. Mijn ervaring bij Episto en mijn eigen project mirook.com sluiten hier naadloos op aan.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor de volledige cyclus van on-page SEO: van keyword research tot publicatie, het schrijven van SEO-blogs en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites met Elementor en Astra. Ik analyseer prestaties met SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console, en gebruik deze inzichten om conversiepaden te optimaliseren. Deze ervaring bereidt mij voor op het eigenaarschap van timefold.ai, het bewaken van uptime, formulieren, tracking en het coördineren van fixes met ontwikkelaars.

Mijn project mirook.com toont mijn vermogen om een website end-to-end te beheren: van ontwerp en bouw tot technische SEO, gestructureerde data (JSON-LD) en GEO-optimalisatie voor AI-zoekmachines. Ik heb hier een llms.txt-bestand geïmplementeerd en entity-markup toegevoegd om de vindbaarheid te verbeteren. Dit sluit aan bij uw behoefte aan een proactieve aanpak van SEO en het meten van prestaties.

Daarnaast heb ik ervaring met sociale media-integratie en contentkalenders. Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig prioriteiten te stellen, samen te werken met externe ontwikkelaars en designers, en kwaliteitscontroles uit te voeren voordat iets live gaat. Mijn technische achtergrond in front-end development (AngularJS, JavaScript) helpt mij om snel problemen te triagen en op te lossen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Gent, en ben flexibel voor hybride werken.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am very excited to apply for the Digital Experience Manager position at Timefold. Your call for a hands-on digital marketer who takes ownership of the website, social media, and conversion optimization resonates strongly with me. My experience at Episto and my own project mirook.com align seamlessly with this role.

At Episto, I handle the full cycle of on-page SEO: from keyword research to publishing, writing SEO blogs, and building and maintaining WordPress sites with Elementor and Astra. I analyze performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console, and use these insights to optimize conversion paths. This experience prepares me to own timefold.ai, monitor uptime, forms, tracking, and coordinate fixes with developers.

My project mirook.com demonstrates my ability to manage a website end-to-end: from design and build to technical SEO, structured data (JSON-LD), and GEO optimization for AI search engines. I implemented an llms.txt file and entity markup to improve discoverability. This aligns with your need for a proactive approach to SEO and performance measurement.

Additionally, I have experience with social media integration and content calendars. I am used to prioritizing tasks independently, collaborating with external developers and designers, and performing quality assurance before going live. My technical background in front-end development (AngularJS, JavaScript) helps me quickly triage and resolve issues.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons to improve). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Ghent, and am flexible for hybrid work.

I hope to discuss my motivation and skills in a personal interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Owned on-page SEO and WordPress site management for multiple client websites at Episto, including keyword research, content publishing, and performance tracking with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console.
• Built and optimized mirook.com end-to-end: WordPress design, structured data (JSON-LD), GEO/AEO techniques, and technical SEO audits to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines.
• Experienced in coordinating with developers and designers to maintain website uptime, fix issues, and ensure quality assurance before launches.
• Proficient in social media content integration and content calendar management, with hands-on experience publishing and tracking engagement.
• Technical foundation in front-end development (AngularJS, JavaScript) enables quick triage of website issues and effective collaboration with engineering teams.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
